git Use the following statement to upload the local file to GitHub.
1 2 3 4 5 hugo server -D hugo -F --cleanDestinationDir git add . git commit -m "xxxx" git push -u origin master 1 2 3 git remote -v //查看远程库 git branch	//查看分支 git checkout main	//切换分支 add picture Add images to the markdown: the images need to be placed in path: /static/img. Then, use the following statement in the markdown.(Typora)
1 ![](/img/xxx.jpg)
